mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.MovMapper.getCntByfileRenameOrgCd */ select count(*) from t_lecture_mov where org_cd=#{orgCd} and file_rename=#{fileRename}
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.MovMapper.getMovInfo */ select * from t_lecture_mov where org_cd=#{orgCd} and idx=#{idx}

/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.MovMapper.getStdntProgressList */ /** 진도율 가져오기 */ SELECT (SELECT EMAIL FROM t_user_info WHERE USER_ID=a.USER_ID) EMAIL ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM t_user_info WHERE USER_ID=a.USER_ID) STDNT_NM ,a.MOV_TIME,a.MOV_ALL_TIME ,b.MAX_REG_DATE,B.MIN_REG_DATE FROM t_lecture_time_stdnt a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EDU_SEQ,TIME_SEQ,USER_ID ,MAX(REG_TIME) MAX_REG_DATE,MIN(REG_TIME) MIN_REG_DATE FROM t_online_history TOH WHERE EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND TIME_SEQ = #{timeSeq} GROUP BY EDU_SEQ,TIME_SEQ,USER_ID ) B ON a.EDU_SEQ =B.EDU_SEQ AND a.TIME_SEQ =B.TIME_SEQ AND a.USER_ID =B.USER_ID WHERE a.EDU_SEQ = #{eduSeq} AND a.TIME_SEQ = #{timeSeq}
